The indispensable Must Read Texas newsletter has 250,000+ subscribers and reaches every part of Texas, with statewide officials, members of Congress, and business and community leaders among our regular readers. for rates and availability! TOP NEWS " Exclusive: Texas teacher accused of molesting student was on 'do not hire' list" via ' Bayliss Wagner - Youths walk by the windows of the dining hall on their way to lunch in 2006 at the Giddings State School in Giddings, Texas. When one of their teachers was arrested and accused of repeatedly molesting an eighth-grade student last fall, Elgin school district officials expressed shock. "Accusations such as these are concerning, and if proven to be true, unacceptable," the Austin-area district told KVUE in November, noting they had moved quickly to assist police when the claims were made against Turran Fennix. But it wasn't the first time that Fennix, 34, had been accused of having inappropriate interactions with a child, according to records obtained by Hearst Newspapers. Two years earlier, Texas' juvenile justice agency barred Fennix from future work in the system after he was caught giving a skin-to-skin back massage to a student in a dorm room, a clear policy violation. Administrators determined he should be fired for the incident, but allowed him to resign instead. Elgin Middle School hired him just a few months later. Fennix's previously unreported trajectory from the Texas Juvenile Justice Department to a middle school raises questions about how thoroughly Elgin vetted the employee and whether the state disclosed his full background. () " As the state targets cities over ICE policies, Austin considers next steps" via Mose Buchele - In some ways, Texas has provided a crystal ball for the rest of the country when it comes to immigration policy. Before the Trump administration poured billions into immigration enforcement and built partnerships between local police and state and federal immigration agents, Texas was already doing it. So, for those opposed to the deportation surge, Texas is worth paying attention to. That was one of the takeaways from a panel Saturday at the KUT Festival. "Kristin Etter , the director of policy and legal services at the Texas Immigration Law Council, said, "Here in Texas, we have kind of a four- to five-year head start when it comes to the rest of the country. We have operated a program called Operation Lone Star that has used state resources. So we have a model here in Texas for this police/ICE collaboration." Another takeaway from the panel: In a state where much of the voting public and all state political leaders support aggressive immigration enforcement, opposition becomes local. In liberal Austin, local leaders have tried to craft policies that would limit police partnering with ICE, but the governor took notice and the Austin Police Department had to soften one policy under threat of funding cuts. City Council Member Zo Qadri said Austin still has tools at its disposal "to make sure that folks are protected and are safe." City Council Member Jos e Velasquez pointed to millions in city funding for local immigration advocacy groups and the council's support for Austin's "safe to call" initiative as examples. () " Tornado in North Texas Destroys Several Buildings and Displaces Residents" via Jesus Jim enez - The whir of chain saws and the beeping of utility trucks were the most prominent sounds around Mineral Wells, Texas, on Wednesday afternoon, after a tornado the previous night ripped through a section of the city. In one industrial sector of Mineral Wells, a town of about 15,000 residents west of the Dallas-Fort Worth area, roofs had been sheared off buildings and other structures had been reduced to piles of what looked like matchsticks. But the destruction appeared limited to an area of commercial properties that were largely empty. Most residential homes in the area were unscathed, and no deaths were reported, though at least five people were hospitalized with non-life-threatening injuries and many residents were displaced, city officials said. Christopher Hester , 33, said that he was sitting in his living room with his wife on Tuesday afternoon when their front door suddenly burst open. He said they immediately took cover in the hallway of their home. () " High gas prices eating into Texans' budgets, fueling inflation" via Cobler andColleen DeGuzman - The large signs outside of gas stations across Texas intended to catch drivers' eyes are lately doing so for all the wrong reasons. At a Valero gas station in Edinburg, Reynaldo Zarazoa , who installs tile for a living and has to haul tools and equipment around in his gray GMC pickup, watched Thursday as the display on the gas pump reached $78 -- nearly a fifth of his weekly income. "My work is cheap and the gas is expensive," said Zarazoa, a father of two living in Peñitas, a small city in the Rio Grande Valley. "But I have to drive every day, every day for work." The price of fuel has risen significantly since the U.S.-Israel war on Iran began on Feb. 28, closing a key international shipping lane for oil and gas, the Strait of Hormuz. The average price for a gallon of gas in Texas was $2.55 in early February, according to AAA. It had risen to $3.78 on Wednesday morning. () " Court sides with 'EPIC City' developers over state agency in fair housing fight" via Nick Wooten - "This ruling confirms what we have maintained from the beginning -- that Community Capital Partners has been willing, ready, and committed to following Texas law at every step," said Imran Chaudhary pictured above at the EPIC City project site outside of Josephine. A Travis County judge has ordered a state agency to comply with the fair housing agreement it made with the developer of a Muslim-centric neighborhood in North Texas. The Texas Workforce Commission must abide by the terms of a September 2025 settlement it reached with developer Community Capital Partners. The group is behind The Meadow, previously called EPIC City. The 201st District Court issued the injunction Tuesday. A judge also denied the state's request to dismiss the case on Wednesday, allowing Community Capital Partners' lawsuit to move forward. () 2026 " Republican Brett Ligon, former Montgomery County DA, wins special election for Texas Senate seat" via Texas Tribune'sAlejandro Serrano and Colleen DeGuzman -Brett Ligon, the Republican former district attorney of Montgomery County, won a special election Saturday for the state Senate district vacated by Brandon Creighton , who was tapped last year to be chancellor of the Texas Tech University System. Ligon defeated Democrat Ron Angeletti , an educator and small-business owner who was the only other candidate on the ballot. The two are set for a rematch in November for a full four-year term. In the meantime, Ligon will serve the remainder of Creighton's term, which runs until the start of the next legislative session in January. "The voters of SD4 have delivered a clear message tonight. Conservative values and Republican dominance in Texas are alive and well," he said in a statement declaring victory 25 minutes after polls closed. "Democrats from Texas and all over the country threw everything they had at us. Democrat politicians were here today in full force, campaigning hard for my opponent. As if we had been flying the 'Come and Take It' flag - they tried - and they failed." Senate District 4 - which spans across Chambers, Harris, Jefferson, and Montgomery counties - voted for President Donald Trump by a 34-point margin in 2024, making it one of the reddest seats in the upper chamber. It is considered a virtual lock for Republicans in November, even with midterm political headwinds that have left Democrats optimistic about flipping GOP legislative seats. () " 'It's a mess': With no Trump endorsement in Texas Senate race, Cornyn and Paxton are locked in an expensive brawl" via Patrick Svitek - Nearly two months ago, President Donald Trump promised he would make an endorsement "soon" in the Republican primary runoff for US Senate in Texas. That endorsement still has not arrived -- and its absence is keeping the race highly competitive. Three people involved in the race said they no longer expected Trump to get involved in the battle between Sen. John Cornyn and Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton. However, they cautioned he could change his mind before the May 26 runoff, keeping both sides on edge in the final weeks. While Democrats haven't won statewide in Texas since 1994, they have a Senate nominee in state Rep. James Talarico who is energizing liberals ahead of the November midterms and raising massive sums. Republicans long wanted to avoid a damaging runoff that could make things easier for Talarico, in part by having Trump boost one candidate and pressure the other to back down. Trump was likely to eventually endorse Cornyn after he and Paxton advanced from a March 3 primary, sources told CNN at the time. However, Trump grew frustrated after Republican operatives leaked his expected plans, the sources said. Trump also fielded calls from some of his most ardent supporters, pushing him not to endorse Cornyn and warning it would be a mistake with his "Make America Great Again" base. () " Talarico leads Cornyn, Paxton in Senate matchups, UT poll finds" via Benjamin Wermund - James Talarico , a Texas Democratic primary candidate for U.S. Senate, leads both Republicans vying to face him in the November U.S. Senate contest, according to a new poll released Wednesday. Talarico led U.S. Sen. John Cornyn 40% to 33% in a potential matchup, and held a 42% to 34% advantage over Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton , the University of Texas at Austin's Texas Politics Project survey found. In both cases, 19% of voters said they were still undecided. The results come as Paxton and Cornyn remain locked in a bitter primary runoff, and the pollsters said Talarico's lead is likely due, at least partially, to the ongoing GOP battle. No Democrat has won a statewide election in Texas in three decades. "While the Democratic candidate leading two established Republicans in these match-ups is sure to raise some eyebrows," they wrote, the results "reveal a Republican electorate still registering the effects of the months-long, bruising, negative campaigning by Paxton and Cornyn, and the GOP divisions the race has exacerbated." () " TX-18 Democratic primary runoff: Christian Menefee vs. Al Green" via Gabby Birenbaum - In this rare clash of sitting incumbents, Houston Democratic Reps. Al Green and Christian Menefee are squaring off after the Legislature consolidated their two Houston districts, both long represented by Black Democrats, into one during last summer's redistricting. The runoff pits the Texas delegation's newest member, Menefee, 38, against one of its longest-tenured -- the 78-year-old Green. With the two candidates largely aligned on policy, the race has turned on each of their fighting styles and whether voters prefer Green's congressional experience and protests against Donald Trump or Menefee's millennial energy and history of waging legal battles with Texas Republicans. The two do have differing stances on cryptocurrency, with Green a skeptic and Menefee more willing to embrace the industry as it spends lavishly in support of his candidacy. Texas' 18th Congressional District has a majority Black voter population and is one of the deepest blue seats in Texas. Long a bastion of Black political power -- past representatives include Barbara Jordan , Craig Washington and Sheila Jackson Lee -- it was left without representation for nearly a year after Rep. Sylvester Turner died in office in March 2025. Menefee led the November special election and won the January runoff to finish out Turner's term. () STATE GOVERNMENT " Dan Patrick eyes closing 'gambling loophole' for prediction markets. The feds stand in Texas' way." via Texas Tribune's Ayden Runnels - In March, Lt. Gov.Dan Patrick directed state senators to explore ways to close "gambling loopholes" that allow online prediction markets to operate in Texas, raising concerns that state elections and sporting events could be manipulated for profit. Patrick's directive was the first time a state leader officially acknowledged the existence of rapidly growing prediction markets, which let users wager on outcomes tied to anything from the weather to election winners and sports scores. Any attempts by the Texas Legislature to restrict prediction operators, however, would run into federal roadblocks as the Trump administration insists that oversight belongs to a U.S. agency, not the states. The Commodity Futures Trading Commission has taken vigorous steps to retain exclusive regulatory oversight, suing to block five states from taking legal action against predictive markets, including a lawsuit filed Tuesday against Wisconsin. () " Future of Texas hemp uncertain in THC fight: 'We're all still very anxious and nervous'" via Adam Schwager - The immediate future of the Texas Hemp industry likely rests in the hands of Travis County District Court Judge Daniella Deseta Lyttle. The hemp industry has asked Judge Lyttle to grant a temporary injunction against the enforcement of new Texas Department of State Health Services (DSHS) rules -- which they claim will shutter the industry. The rules first went into effect on March 31, but were later halted by a temporary restraining order which expires on May 1. If Judge Lyttle grants the Texas hemp industry the injunction? "We'll expand on our THC product line. We're actually having a conversation about having a third location if this goes through," Happy Cactus co-owner Todd Harris said. "We're all still very anxious and nervous." If the order is denied it would result in skyrocketing licensure fees and the ban of intoxicating hemp flower, which Harris says makes up 70% of his sales. And instead of opening a new store, he might have to close one. "This [east Austin] location and how it survives and thrives is very much tied to how the injunction and what happens in that courtroom," Harris said. In the courtroom, the Texas Hemp industry called two witnesses to the stand: Galveston-county based hemp store operator Kenneth Burner , and Texas Hemp Business Council (THBC) Executive Director Mark Bordas. Burner, an Iraq veteran, highlighted his practice of employing those who've either served in the military or as a first responder. "Tells us something about their character right from the beginning," he said. () " Commissioners accept financing deal for new baseball stadium that gives the county a park" via Biediger - The decisions made during negotiations between Bexar County Commissioners and Missions baseball owners have been mostly behind closed doors -- until now. On Tuesday during Commissioner's Court, the officials agreed to a kind of trade with Designated Bidders, revealing something of how that deal will be structured. The agreement approved by commissioners gives the county two parcels of land for a park near the San Pedro Creek Cultural Park in exchange for restructuring the financing agreement it made with the team's ownership group in 2024 to build a new downtown ballpark. At the same time, county officials agreed to release its portion of the tax increment guarantee from the Houston Street Tax Increment Reinvestment Zone, which is estimated to make up 14% of the total ballpark project cost. () LOCAL GOVERNMENT " Powerful North Texas transportation leader fired after 35 years on the job" via Rachel Behrndt \-- Michael Morris , a longtime regional official who oversaw hundreds of billions of dollars of transportation projects, was fired from his position after 35 years on the job, officials said. The firing followed a months-long fight and a weeks-long court battle that pit two powerful government entities against each other over the firing and has now led TxDOT to propose a new agreement clarifying which group has the power to terminate the official, according to documents reviewed by WFAA. Morris served as the Director of Transportation for the North Central Texas Council of Governments (NCTCOG) for 35 years, according to a statement from the organization. His last day on the job was April 28, 2026, the statement reads. "We are grateful for his more than 40 years of service to the region, including 35 years of leadership that helped shape one of the nation's most dynamic transportation systems," the statement reads. () " Dallas' Highland Park votes to leave Texas' second-largest public transit system" via Joshua Fechter and Colleen DeGuzman -- Dallas Area Rapid Transit, the state's second largest public transit agency, fractured Saturday as voters in one suburb chose to leave the transit system. Highland Park will pull out of DART, according to election returns Saturday. It's the first time any city has pulled up its stake in the agency since 1989 when Flower Mound and Coppell opted to leave. Voters in Addison and University Park also weighed in on proposals to leave the system but chose to remain in the agency. This leaves 12 cities connected through DART. Nearly 70% of voters in Highland Park decided to discontinue DART in the town, according to final but unofficial returns. The result was mirrored in Addison, where 70% voted to remain connected to the system; University Park was more narrowly divided, with 54% voting to stay. () " After Austin train derailment, calls grow to move freight rail out of downtown" via Alex Driggars - A freight train derailment in downtown Austin last month is prompting Travis County JudgeAndy Browwn to renew calls to move a major rail line out of the city's urban core -- a long-debated idea that has yet to gain traction. Seven Union Pacific cars derailed early on April 23 as a 230-car train rounded a sharp curve near West Third and Bowie streets in the Seaholm District. No one was injured, but the incident snarled traffic for hours and delayed school bus routes in West Austin as crews worked to clear the scene. The train was transporting "mixed commodities" rather than hazardous chemicals, but Brown -- a longtime passenger rail advocate who oversees emergency management in his role as county judge -- said the cars could just as easily have been carrying something far more dangerous, like chlorine. "Chlorine can cause a cloud of chlorine gas, and that would be a horrible thing," Brown said. "Just the fact that you're potentially carrying hazardous chemicals right through this huge metro area with condos literally feet away from where this curve was is not great." () " Is APD really 'quiet quitting'? Critics raise concerns as response times lag" via Austin Sanders and Karina Kumar - Last month, Austinites and officials alike heaped praise on the Austin Police Department after officers responded to a mass shooting on West Sixth Street in 57 seconds and took down the gunman minutes later. The praise for the speedy response was rare for the Austin Police Department, which has struggled for years with slow response times and regularly faces online criticism and complaints. The rapid intervention also raised a question: Is the Police Department getting faster? An American-Statesman analysis of median response times over the past decade shows that the swift reaction to the Buford's Bar shooting was an outlier. Since 2017, response times - while seeing some improvement in the last year under Police Chief Lisa Davis - have lagged even as 911 call volumes have decreased. The findings are reflected in public complaints. Since the city's police oversight agency began categorizing grievances in 2022, the most common type has been "no assistance," which includes slow responses and alleged no-shows. () " A solar surge in Austin: New projects target reliability and climate goals" via Chaya Tong - Austin is betting on solar power as it confronts a growing energy crunch, approving a slate of projects aimed at boosting local generation and cutting reliance on the broader ERCOT grid. The City Council recently approved three proposals designed to expand that local capacity: a new solar facility on a closed city landfill, solar installations across city facilities and negotiations for up to 40 megawatts of battery storage in partnership with local manufacturer Base Power, Inc. Austin Energy spokesperson Matt Mitchell said the initiatives would add about 78 megawatts of capacity -- enough energy to power nearly 20,000 homes for a year -- and the agreement with Base Power offers comparable value to the 100 megawatt Jupiter battery contract the council approved last July. Mitchell said the utility was already 73% carbon-free last year, offsetting 65% of customer demand, and argued that expanding local generation helps stabilize costs by reducing the need to import power during extreme weather and peak demand. () " San Antonio psychiatric hospital laying off nearly 650 employees" via O 'Neill - Laurel Ridge Treatment Center on the far North Side plans to lay off 648 employees starting in June, after the federal government terminated its Medicare and Medicaid coverage. After losing its Medicare and Medicaid funding, San Antonio's Laurel Ridge Treatment Center is planning to lay off hundreds of employees. "As a result of this regulatory action, we must implement a workforce reduction," Ashley Sacriste , CEO of Laurel Ridge, said in a statement. The hospital is "deeply disappointed by this outcome and recognizes the significant impact it will have on our dedicated team members and the communities we serve," she added. () " A Houston ISD exec tapped for Beaumont schools superintendent during its second state takeover" via Sneha Dey - Texas officials again tapped a Houston schools administrator to helm a state takeover, this time for Beaumont ISD. Sandi Massey is the new state-appointed superintendent of Beaumont ISD as the district has struggled with years of poor academic performance. Massey comes from the nearby Houston ISD, where she was the chief of schools during a takeover that has been controversial among parents but lauded among state leaders. "I know what it takes to transform a district," Massey said at a press conference Wednesday. "I am ready to do it here in Beaumont and make this city the best instruction you've ever seen." Massey is the third Houston schools official tapped in recent weeks to help shepherd a state takeover. Texas Education Agency commissioner Mike Morath appointed Ena Meyers , who was a Houston ISD chief, as superintendent of Lake Worth ISD last week. And Peter Licata , on his first day on the job as the state-appointed superintendent of Fort Worth ISD, hired another Houston ISD chief Daniel Soliz as his deputy. () BUSINESS NEWS " D-FW's GameStop bids $56 billion to buy iconic internet auctioneer eBay" via Brian Womack - GameStop is proposing to acquire eBay in a deal that would bring one of the bigger names in Internet history under a North Texas-based company. The Grapevine-based retailer said it submitted a non-binding proposal to acquire the Silicon Valley e-commerce company for $125 per share, according to a GameStop statement. The aggregate undiluted equity value is approximately $55.5 billion. The proposed offer is comprised of 50% cash and 50% GameStop common stock. The North Texas company has built a 5% economic stake in eBay through derivatives and beneficial ownership of stock. GameStop -- known in some circles more for its "meme stock" days and a push into Bitcoin -- could be making a significant move with the proposed acquisition. The company, which has been shuttering stores where it sells video games, consoles and collectibles, saw its sales decline in the previous fiscal year though it swung to an operating income from a loss. name: Jessica Killin
subject: We just made the Red to Blue list
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO
body:
CO-05 is now one of the most watched races in the country

This is major news — and I wanted you to hear it directly from me. **I’ve officially been added to the Democrats’ _Red to Blue_ program — a select group of competitive House candidates who have the best chance at flipping Republican-held seats.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130751321/618828912/102383775?amounts=5,20,50,75,100,250,500&amount=20&refcode=email_050426_killin&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjFmNmZjMi0xZDQ4LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8l15s-BPocNEzgylgQOIR8fdD7aWndCh-iLD9ERgHVw=) **_[I’ll explain more about what this means, but if you’re ready to help us build on this moment and take back the House, will you split $20 between John Hickenlooper and me right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130751322/618828913/102383775?amounts=5,20,50,75,100,250,500&amount=20&refcode=email_050426_killin&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjFmNmZjMi0xZDQ4LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8l15s-BPocNEzgylgQOIR8fdD7aWndCh-iLD9ERgHVw=)_** | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130751323/618828914/102383775?amounts=5,20,50,75,100,250,500&amount=20&refcode=email_050426_killin&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjFmNmZjMi0xZDQ4LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8l15s-BPocNEzgylgQOIR8fdD7aWndCh-iLD9ERgHVw=)
---
This is a clear signal that CO-05 is now officially one of the districts that will help decide control of the House. And this recognition means national Democrats see what we’ve been building here: _a real, competitive path to victory._
**It also changes the race.**
With this recognition comes a bigger target on our back. National Republican groups are already preparing to pour outside money into CO-05 to protect Jeff Crank and try to stop our momentum.
We’re entering a new phase of this campaign — higher stakes, more attention, and a sharper contrast than ever before.

name: Sarah McBride (personal)
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
We reached our goal.
# [](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1269?t=1&akid=3212%2E21716%2E6OmxpG)
Our team just finished tallying the final fundraising numbers for April, and I’m proud to share that we hit our goal.
_Thank you._
Reaching this goal means I can stay laser-focused on fighting for Delawareans and working people across the country in Congress.
That matters, especially right now.
We’re seeing the cruelty and chaos of the Trump administration play out in real time — attacks on healthcare, rising costs for families, and a politics more focused on division than delivering results.
With your support, we can keep building the campaign we need to win, take back the House this November, and pull the emergency brake on this president.
[**If you weren’t able to chip in before our deadline, I’d be so grateful if you made a contribution today in support of my campaign. Every single donation makes a powerful difference as the midterm election heats up.**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20260504-1.-Y9eAt&refcode=em20260504-3212&amount=5&t=2&akid=3212%2E21716%2E6OmxpG)

name: Trump Lawsuit Alert via the DNC
subject: Derek, we have an important update for you:
body:

Derek, our legal team has an important update for you: **We are SUING the Trump administration** to block his executive order restricting vote-by-mail and giving the federal government oversight over who can mail back a ballot. Our lawyers are hard at work, but they can't do it alone. We have a narrow window to win and protect voting rights so we can defeat Trump this November. name: Rob Bonta
subject: The U.S. Supreme Court must protect healthcare access
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26]
BREAKING: Today I’m co-leading a coalition of more than 20 states in urging the U.S. Supreme Court to protect access to mifepristone, a safe and effective abortion medication.
On Friday, a federal court of appeals reinstated a medically unnecessary requirement that mifepristone be dispensed in person. That ruling is NOT supported by science, would create administrative chaos across the country, and would undermine states’ ability to protect access to reproductive care.
Soon after we filed our amicus brief, the Supreme Court granted an administrative stay, temporarily pausing the lower court’s ruling until next Monday. I strongly urge the Supreme Court to issue a final ruling that protects the availability of mifepristone through telehealth, making it easier for women, especially in rural, low-income, and underserved communities, to access reproductive health care.
Bottom line: mifepristone is a safe, effective, and lifesaving medication, and attempts to limit access to it are driven by a right-wing, anti-science political agenda determined to chip away at reproductive freedom nationwide.
As Attorney General of California, I will never stop fighting to protect reproductive freedom for every single Californian — because reproductive rights are human rights.
If you’re with me, I’m asking you to step up and power this work with a contribution of whatever amount you can afford today. You can give by clicking this link or on the buttons below. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26?amount=50]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26?express_lane=true&amount=25] DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26?express_lane=true&amount=100] DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26?express_lane=true&amount=250]
DONATE $500 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26?express_lane=true&amount=500] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26]
Anything you can give makes a difference. Thank you for being part of this team and this ongoing work to protect the rights and freedoms of every Californian.
—Rob
Rob Bonta
Attorney General of California
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26?amount=50]
CONTRIBUTE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26?amount=50]

Rob Bonta for Attorney General 2026

name: bishforcongress.com
subject: Christine Bish Has a Plan to Fix California’s Wildfire Insurance Crisis
body:
[ View in browser](https://m4s4f.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/mr/sh/WCPxRrNLV1LtwSCEGcqYZQVm93Fhn2uH/kNjDUxW_TIA5)

**Christine Bish Announces the WILDFIRE Act to Restore Insurance Access and Protect California Communities
========================================================================================================**

I’m announcing my plan to fix California’s wildfire insurance crisis.

I want to share something important with you today. I am officially announcing the WILDFIRE Act.

A comprehensive plan to stabilize California’s collapsing wildfire insurance market, restore access to coverage for homeowners, and reduce long term disaster costs.

The reality is this: in wildfire country, insurance is not optional. It is survival.

Right now, too many families across our district are losing coverage, facing massive premium increases, or being pushed into expensive, limited plans that do not fully protect them. Entire communities are at risk of becoming uninsurable, and that threatens not just homeowners, but property values, mortgages, and local economies.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

We cannot keep waiting for the system to fix itself. It will not.
-----------------------------------------------------------------

That is why I developed the WILDFIRE Act. The Wildfire Insurance and Loss Defense, Federal Intervention and Risk Enhancement Act to create a national framework that actually works.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

The Wildfire Act is the Plan to Fix California’s Wildfire Insurance Crisis
--------------------------------------------------------------------------
This plan establishes a National Wildfire Insurance Program, administered by the Treasury and FEMA, to provide reliable baseline coverage. It includes a federal backstop for catastrophic losses, but only after private and state systems are exhausted, ensuring accountability and protecting taxpayers.

Just as importantly, this plan is built with discipline and transparency. It uses premium based participation, requires repayment mechanisms, and rewards homeowners who take steps to reduce risk through mitigation efforts like defensible space and fire resistant construction.

This is not about expanding government for the sake of it. It is about restoring a functioning private insurance market while making sure families are not left without options.

The urgency is real here in our district. Communities like El Dorado County, Truckee, South Lake Tahoe, Grass Valley, and Penn Valley are on the front lines of this crisis. People are doing everything right and still losing coverage.

[ That is unacceptable.](https://m4s4f.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/sh/WCPzyXJTZ6uvfh6CvvTeS466g94v5105/KwvRK4V-uotv)

The WILDFIRE Act takes a different approach. Instead of reacting after disaster strikes, it prepares before it happens. It brings stability back to the market, gives homeowners clarity, and reduces long term costs for taxpayers.

Within 180 days, this plan puts rules in place. Within one year, it launches a pilot program in high risk areas like ours. Within three years, it expands nationwide with full congressional oversight to ensure it works as intended.

This is a serious problem, and it deserves a serious solution.

The current system is failing families. My plan is designed to fix it.

But I cannot take this fight to Washington alone.

If you believe we need real solutions, not empty promises

If you believe families deserve access to reliable insurance

If you believe it is time to protect our communities before disaster strikes.

[ I am asking you to stand with me.](https://m4s4f.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/sh/WCPzyXJTZ72ijjJTI0xKDoFtovy2KicD/yD4kd_3xInCe)

Together, we can bring this plan to Congress and deliver real results for the people who need it most.

Thank you for your support,

Christine Bish

Candidate for Congress, CA-03

**Meeting with Local Leaders**
------------------------------
Christine Bish met with local leaders this week at the Chamber of Commerce to talk about one issue that keeps coming up again and again: wildfire insurance.

From small business owners to insurance agents and community leaders, the message was clear. The current system is not working.

Policies are being dropped. Costs are rising. And communities are being left behind.

That is exactly why Christine is fighting for the WILDFIRE Act a real solution to restore access to insurance, stabilize the market, and protect families and businesses before disaster strikes.

These conversations matter. Because real solutions come from listening to the people living it every day.

**bishforcongress.com**

8121 Golden Vista Way, 95843, Antelope

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

You've received this email because you've subscribed to our newsletter.

[Unsubscribe](https://m4s4f.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/un/v2/sh/WCPxRrWByckTj8nTRQetzL09AeXc94sL/DbPfcKeCvu_9)

name: Katie Porter
subject: Heartwarming conversations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
I’m so grateful for the people who are powering this campaign.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=41275%2E3422442%2E_ovyPD)
Dear Peter,
**Our Whiteboard Warriors tour is full steam ahead** , crisscrossing California to hear directly from voters and share my plan to fix our state.
The conversations I’ve had are heartwarming. Our state is full of good, hardworking people who are struggling to get by. But together, we’ll get California back on track.
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260504_3_ak.eAzHmc&refcode=em20260504-41275&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=41275%2E3422442%2E_ovyPD)
At one stop, I met Dana. **After hearing about our plan to lower costs for working families, he asked if he could make a donation to our campaign right then and there.**
I’m so grateful for people like Dana who are powering this campaign. I’ve never taken a dime of corporate PAC money. I rely on grassroots supporters like him to keep us going.
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260504_3_ak.eAzHmc&refcode=em20260504-41275&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=41275%2E3422442%2E_ovyPD)
At another stop, Carol shared what she’s seeing happening across California:
_“You're setting the stage for what's going to happen next. And there's a lot of things that are falling apart that need to be put back together if we can. There's nobody better than her out there.”_
I agree. California is in this mess because of big corporations. Now, they’re backing candidates who won’t stand up to them.
Unlike my opponents, I’m unbought. Instead of relying on their money, I’m on the road to meet people like Dana and Carol and earn their support.
**[With just over a month to go, I need your help to stay on the road through the primary. Can you chip in $5 or more to power our Whiteboard Warriors tour?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260504_3_ak.eAzHmc&refcode=em20260504-41275&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=41275%2E3422442%2E_ovyPD)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260504_3_ak.eAzHmc&refcode=em20260504-41275&t=24&akid=41275%2E3422442%2E_ovyPD)
Thank you,
Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260504-41275&amounts=&t=25&refcode2=41275_3422442__ovyPD&akid=41275%2E3422442%2E_ovyPD)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=41275&t=26&akid=41275%2E3422442%2E_ovyPD)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=41275)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=41275&t=27&akid=41275%2E3422442%2E_ovyPD)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
FFPC #1479597
clean_body: I’m so grateful for the people who are powering this campaign. Dear Peter, Our Whiteboard Warriors tour is full steam ahead , crisscrossing California to hear directly from voters and share my plan to fix our state. The conversations I’ve had are heartwarming. Our state is full of good, hardworking people who are struggling to get by. But together, we’ll get California back on track. At one stop, I met Dana. After hearing about our plan to lower costs for working families, he asked if he could make a donation to our campaign right then and there. I’m so grateful for people like Dana who are powering this campaign. I’ve never taken a dime of corporate PAC money. I rely on grassroots supporters like him to keep us going. At another stop, Carol shared what she’s seeing happening across California: “You're setting the stage for what's going to happen next. And there's a lot of things that are falling apart that need to be put back together if we can. There's nobody better than her out there.” I agree. California is in this mess because of big corporations. Now, they’re backing candidates who won’t stand up to them. Unlike my opponents, I’m unbought. Instead of relying on their money, I’m on the road to meet people like Dana and Carol and earn their support. Thank you, Katie Porter Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change.

name: Senator Tom Willis
subject: West Virginia Deserves Better — 7 Days Until the Republican Primary
body:
| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6153c6a017f8/west-virginia-deserves-better-7-days-until-the-republican-primary?e=a0285cc040)
---
|
---
| | | | | |

# West Virginia Deserves Better **— **
# 7 Days Until the Republican Primary

---
|
---
|
---
| |
Dear Friend,

People ask me why I’m running for the U.S. Senate.
Here’s the truth:
**Because Washington isn’t working for West Virginia anymore.**
Too many politicians go there to build power—
Protect their position—
Take care of themselves.
**That’s not me.**
I spent **26 years serving this country as a Green Beret.**
I’ve **built businesses right here in West Virginia.**
I’ve lived under the same regulations and pressures you deal with every day.
I know what it’s like to meet payroll.
To deal with government overreach.
To fight to keep costs down.
**Career politicians don’t.**
**They talk about problems—I’ve lived them.**
I’m running because West Virginia needs a U.S. Senator who understands real life—not just Washington.
**Someone who will fight for:**
* **Securing the border and enforcing our laws**
* **Defending life and our constitutional rights**
* **Protecting the 2nd Amendment and religious freedom**
* **A balanced budget to tackle our national debt**
* **Investing in West Virginia infrastructure—roads and water systems**

And lowering costs for working families by:
* Limiting the size of government
* Cutting unnecessary regulations
* Promoting free-market competition

**Not more bureaucracy.**
**Not more control.**
**Not more of the same.**

* * *

If you want someone who will serve—not rule—
**VOTE TOM WILLIS — MAY 12 PRIMARY**
**Early voting ends Saturday, May 9**
**7 DAYS LEFT**
Together, we can bring real leadership back to West Virginia.
**It’s Time for a Change, West Virginia.**
Sincerely,
**Tom Willis**

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Break Hollywood’s monopoly on children’s entertainment
body:
Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love.

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkc2K2zAUhZ9G3inoX8nCiwTHodCUYoaUroR-rhMR2TKyPMO8fUnpPEC3H9-9cM75dTVXG1Oc7z_sBG2poymrcQXs85FT-vzIOaxTnvOS02eeDSNMYSIxkS-PNqENPljqG2ip1vqgJee8ebQj4V7w0cGBae-BUsH3xGtNlRaEBNLE9vWKSCIpIYzSXVBKOy69dFZJKi0SxCYodVdg2VyK3s7Vrs8xFw87n6cmtY9alxXxI2I9Yv0KfiuwszOEXF8GYr0r9h2wy_m5ItYzTSXzbI-DBIWFEwLvqdpjkE4rBXrcHyji_VYns-ateEC8O3UXPJxviKkXniDEbUK8O1__EW-nxcb7jHjHCJNEUGJO3cWchuPtbL5dLr-Z_G6G8838POLhrf86y3OFuSLeDW89_qqiKW1YPmJKcVUaCXKfbEx_w9b_n-a9ZX8CAAD__06qlp0)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkc2K2zAUhZ9G3inoX8nCiwTHodCUYoaUroR-rhMR2TKyPMO8fUnpPEC3H9-9cM75dTVXG1Oc7z_sBG2poymrcQXs85FT-vzIOaxTnvOS02eeDSNMYSIxkS-PNqENPljqG2ip1vqgJee8ebQj4V7w0cGBae-BUsH3xGtNlRaEBNLE9vWKSCIpIYzSXVBKOy69dFZJKi0SxCYodVdg2VyK3s7Vrs8xFw87n6cmtY9alxXxI2I9Yv0KfiuwszOEXF8GYr0r9h2wy_m5ItYzTSXzbI-DBIWFEwLvqdpjkE4rBXrcHyji_VYns-ateEC8O3UXPJxviKkXniDEbUK8O1__EW-nxcb7jHjHCJNEUGJO3cWchuPtbL5dLr-Z_G6G8838POLhrf86y3OFuSLeDW89_qqiKW1YPmJKcVUaCXKfbEx_w9b_n-a9ZX8CAAD__06qlp0)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkc2K2zAUhZ9G3inoX8nCiwTHodCUYoaUroR-rhMR2TKyPMO8fUnpPEC3H9-9cM75dTVXG1Oc7z_sBG2poymrcQXs85FT-vzIOaxTnvOS02eeDSNMYSIxkS-PNqENPljqG2ip1vqgJee8ebQj4V7w0cGBae-BUsH3xGtNlRaEBNLE9vWKSCIpIYzSXVBKOy69dFZJKi0SxCYodVdg2VyK3s7Vrs8xFw87n6cmtY9alxXxI2I9Yv0KfiuwszOEXF8GYr0r9h2wy_m5ItYzTSXzbI-DBIWFEwLvqdpjkE4rBXrcHyji_VYns-ateEC8O3UXPJxviKkXniDEbUK8O1__EW-nxcb7jHjHCJNEUGJO3cWchuPtbL5dLr-Z_G6G8838POLhrf86y3OFuSLeDW89_qqiKW1YPmJKcVUaCXKfbEx_w9b_n-a9ZX8CAAD__06qlp0) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkc2K2zAUhZ9G3inoX8nCiwTHodCUYoaUroR-rhMR2TKyPMO8fUnpPEC3H9-9cM75dTVXG1Oc7z_sBG2poymrcQXs85FT-vzIOaxTnvOS02eeDSNMYSIxkS-PNqENPljqG2ip1vqgJee8ebQj4V7w0cGBae-BUsH3xGtNlRaEBNLE9vWKSCIpIYzSXVBKOy69dFZJKi0SxCYodVdg2VyK3s7Vrs8xFw87n6cmtY9alxXxI2I9Yv0KfiuwszOEXF8GYr0r9h2wy_m5ItYzTSXzbI-DBIWFEwLvqdpjkE4rBXrcHyji_VYns-ateEC8O3UXPJxviKkXniDEbUK8O1__EW-nxcb7jHjHCJNEUGJO3cWchuPtbL5dLr-Z_G6G8838POLhrf86y3OFuSLeDW89_qqiKW1YPmJKcVUaCXKfbEx_w9b_n-a9ZX8CAAD__06qlp0)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkc2K2zAUhZ9G3inoX8nCiwTHodCUYoaUroR-rhMR2TKyPMO8fUnpPEC3H9-9cM75dTVXG1Oc7z_sBG2poymrcQXs85FT-vzIOaxTnvOS02eeDSNMYSIxkS-PNqENPljqG2ip1vqgJee8ebQj4V7w0cGBae-BUsH3xGtNlRaEBNLE9vWKSCIpIYzSXVBKOy69dFZJKi0SxCYodVdg2VyK3s7Vrs8xFw87n6cmtY9alxXxI2I9Yv0KfiuwszOEXF8GYr0r9h2wy_m5ItYzTSXzbI-DBIWFEwLvqdpjkE4rBXrcHyji_VYns-ateEC8O3UXPJxviKkXniDEbUK8O1__EW-nxcb7jHjHCJNEUGJO3cWchuPtbL5dLr-Z_G6G8838POLhrf86y3OFuSLeDW89_qqiKW1YPmJKcVUaCXKfbEx_w9b_n-a9ZX8CAAD__06qlp0)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---

clean_body: Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue’s Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. Introducing: Iggy and Mr. Kirk.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at Brave Books.If you’ve seen me and Brave Books on Fox News , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television. > Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter. The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of Iggy and Mr. Kirk! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced the parents watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now Brave Books has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with. #1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left. You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of Iggy and Mr. Kirk available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. As our special “Thank You” for becoming a Founding Supporter at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of Iggy and Mr. Kirk FREE on DVD.This exclusive Iggy and Mr. Kirk DVD is only offered to Founding Supporters. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Iggy and Mr. Kirk. Sincerely, | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!) Actor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. body:
The U.S. military [sank at least six Iranian small boats](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGO2zAMgOGnkTcGsmJJzaChi7fr2tGQLSpmK0uByFyQPn3he4VbuBD4wY-_P5aPSIXq_Vc8MEhuS8UXFxTBvjyZqf5l6rGuLQpHytQx030x2jjQFrRdUqTyXqYhhYxo8DpgGL33N2-t98Me1ptz6erWKV31j4zRRO385lc7bVtMOQ8Uzpq22o5au9FfxnFb_Yh506OezG1Vk8ZE0vrlT6MqO-bybp_YL1s7hhJ2kQer609lZmXm-n40lnOlzHyGlZm1PcekzPxqvSQ4icrMT4bc-oYMJxMcnFCKFfiIpcAXGaiC7AgsPZJAy7C3fjz_QWTYGwsVEkKGFeWFWOHJILj3WKEj3SsJKjMPPaTHi0ohdl5N-n5EKl_Xy7de_hnM_wAAAP__vG2X8A) in the Strait of Hormuz on Monday after Iran launched cruise missiles, drones, and small boats at U.S. Navy ships and commercial vessels.

| | |

| [](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLuO3DAMRb9G7magh2WNCxUBFtNt2pQCLVM2Ez0MSZ7F_n3gTZAfSMtzQfKeH-_uHShS3r5DQttDcRk_WsTesbqzNcq_GlXIS4HegAJVDLQ5yeV04_rGtVuB4qcbh9UGRIlqQCuMMbPR2phht2OYJy8Mzl5CMKtewMyAwB-znvkiYSB7beOaa8H5JMxdCL8YgcFzwUc5L2zkuFIv9f6zUO47hvhZXljvvqQh2r33ozH1jcknk0_KL2z9nqiVWpbSybcrd0H1PHtyrZzVI1NvmIAik9M1TLjSmZh6O4DW2wG1Z6xtp-Mv95AOoC1_Jf5B8eA3pZX7I-LM1MEpJR5cj1eXodr1-KAYqU2GjXy7Dn493f_L9MvK3wEAAP__yj6TUQ) | |
# Tuesday, May 5, 2026
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this date in 1862, Mexican troops defeated a superior French army at the Battle of Puebla, inspiring the annual [Cinco de Mayo](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFu7CAUheHV4M7WBRvzpqB4jbtJmxJhuNg3wTACMpZ3H02UHaQ-R1_xv9_N3VKktL3ZA3UL2SQ8a8TWsJivWil9Vio2rdm2ailQwUCbESDmHmQP0nhL8TJT53VAFDh2qLlS6qakVKrbNUqO6Lhy6zQBoJUi_HMzehjVPPJVdKRfGkiQHGDmauDcrYpjcMBhEreVTYCeWi7DR6bUdgzxyk8sg8tHF_Xe2qOy8T8TCxPLeZ7DTrXlcr12JhZbGrmIlYnFUXK599gf9sr9760r2j9OipHqrNgE22Ep_tjtT0GeWnwHAAD___07dew) holiday that we celebrate today, though perhaps now more in thanks for the margaritas than the military victory. A bakery truck driver in New Jersey was happily cruising along on Sunday, singing along to a tune, [when a plane coming in for a landing](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuhDAQBNCvMd2htcG3oXCRhu7SpkQ2XnObGIxsB3R_H5FfSDfSSE-a-XxMD8uRt-XDrmRqSNNGZ4lUK-XppxTevgtnu7lka7EcOFPgZVKg7jfQN9CTtxxfU994E4gUdQ0ZiYgDao3YPA2AVp1Eh72TwxwUut5pK98GQt9ZRw2bSwMNWgLcJbZSzg4lhRkk9GpwogfyXFNuvxJv9UkhvtJBuZ3T2kTzrHUvonsXahRqPM-zdW6-OqHGa4xQ48Ge0hXmjPuxxMHvlJps_H5yjFzuKHpYVsvxz6z_OuIw6jcAAP__swNx5g) smacked his truck. You can see the dashcam video in _Et Cetera_ below. The stock market has been on a tear as of late. Both the S&P 500 and Nasdaq both closed at fresh all-time highs last Friday, and the Dow is climbing back toward 50,000. Yesterday was down a bit, but the market has been rallying. What's actually driving it? Is it Big Tech earnings? The AI buildout? Hopes that the war in Iran ends soon? On today's episode of _The Flyover Podcast_ , host Ayla Brown breaks down the three forces behind Wall Street's record run and what investors are watching next. [Tune in](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykzzFy6yAQgOHTQGfNshZiKChe486vTckgsdibYNAAsaPbZ5Ir5AD_P_O9Xf01cOZy-x8e5EaqvtCrZxqDmv_snctH5xbKWsPogRM3SnzzCLicQJ9A-xg4H36W0SUipLMkp4wx1mhtjLy7bSNUEOdkrdJxQQyGbIiIYCOZRJLdzw00aAWwKDMpta1GUdpAwYx2FTNQ5FHb9F65jDulfNQntWmrD5ndfYy9i_M_gReBl0ZrCyVO-RB42Wukr9GCks3F_cU5c1-MmOH2CJx_-_En9NPhdwAAAP__n3Brjg)! Today's sponsor, [Miso Robotic](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLuO3DAMRb9G7magh2WNCxUBFtNt2pQCLVM2Ez0MSZ7F_n3gTZAfSMtzQfKeH-_uHShS3r5DQttDcRk_WsTesbqzNcq_GlXIS4HegAJVDLQ5yeV04_rGtVuB4qcbh9UGRIlqQCuMMbPR2phht2OYJy8Mzl5CMKtewMyAwB-znvkiYSB7beOaa8H5JMxdCL8YgcFzwUc5L2zkuFIv9f6zUO47hvhZXljvvqQh2r33ozH1jcknk0_KL2z9nqiVWpbSybcrd0H1PHtyrZzVI1NvmIAik9M1TLjSmZh6O4DW2wG1Z6xtp-Mv95AOoC1_Jf5B8eA3pZX7I-LM1MEpJR5cj1eXodr1-KAYqU2GjXy7Dn493f_L9MvK3wEAAP__yj6TUQ)s, is developing next-generation AI-powered kitchen robots--backed by NVIDIA and already used by major brands--to transform the massive fast-food industry with faster, more efficient automation

## US Sinks 6 Iranian Boats in Hormuz
The U.S. military [sank at least six Iranian small boats](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGO2zAMgOGnkTcGsmJJzaChi7fr2tGQLSpmK0uByFyQPn3he4VbuBD4wY-_P5aPSIXq_Vc8MEhuS8UXFxTBvjyZqf5l6rGuLQpHytQx030x2jjQFrRdUqTyXqYhhYxo8DpgGL33N2-t98Me1ptz6erWKV31j4zRRO385lc7bVtMOQ8Uzpq22o5au9FfxnFb_Yh506OezG1Vk8ZE0vrlT6MqO-bybp_YL1s7hhJ2kQer609lZmXm-n40lnOlzHyGlZm1PcekzPxqvSQ4icrMT4bc-oYMJxMcnFCKFfiIpcAXGaiC7AgsPZJAy7C3fjz_QWTYGwsVEkKGFeWFWOHJILj3WKEj3SsJKjMPPaTHi0ohdl5N-n5EKl_Xy7de_hnM_wAAAP__vG2X8A) in the Strait of Hormuz on Monday after Iran launched cruise missiles, drones, and sent small boats at U.S. Navy ships and commercial vessels. The flare-up came as President Trump kicked off Project Freedom, a [new initiative](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAURb8Gb1hAeEYZGLp4S9eO1gM_4tdiOwISK39fub_Q5S5XOlfnft2mG3Lm7f6JK_mW9mmjo2Zqjcr0rJW3n8oFt7Bjq8iJCyW-T0aZQSqQCqYZOb8n280-ERm6dOS1c-7qAJzrFo8mOIdgk74OAQOmYbYqadCAEBNAx_6kKVCglRq067WOwWlKUWllzTUIq2jmtpf-e-etLZTye39R6eO-dtkvrT2quHwIMwozHsfRxy3EsxRmPNHCjArOsMKMp4w8sMgnkmzluT5kJKx0msmVa-VMtV_amrvi58fBOXMdnLDqviLnv832r6Ne3vwGAAD__xxhfDM) to guide hundreds of stranded commercial ships out of the Persian Gulf.

Two U.S.-flagged merchant vessels successfully transited the strait on Monday, but a United Arab Emirates-owned tanker was hit by Iranian drones, and a South Korean cargo ship was also targeted. Trump said Iran's small boats are ["all they have left"](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1u4zAQxfHTSJ2NGYofUsFigYU6b7VASoEmh9YklCiQtA3fPnCukPY94Ff8Py7LxXHi_fbPbWRbzMtOz5qoNSrLvVbevyoXt1-za9Vx5EKRb4sAoU-gTqCW4Di9FtkHG4kEDT1ZNMZMRilj-tW6qAJi8FKjEd44EBA0RS38MI6DxJ7tWwMFCgE0mjOivxqk6AFBiunaSaDALZfzZ-a9rRTTKz-onH3e-mTX1o7aDX86MXdibuXe1po9u_T-36OEQi79zbtL4X-5b0cn5iPXVjsxI2qFRg6jNqPESQ9TX2w4npwSV206CbfN8Q_Vt1_1eVjxHQAA__82wXdH) and called on South Korea to join the mission after one of its cargo ships was hit. The UAE moved schools to remote learning through Friday over safety concerns.
## GameStop Makes $56B Play for eBay
Video game retailer GameStop made an unsolicited [$56 billion offer](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2OpDAUBODTmMzoYWxMBw42IetNN0TGPOBt-6dlexpx-xFzhUkqKelTqf4956clT3H_awOauqU54lk81op5_iqF4qtQtnFJthZLG2XcaJ8FiIGD4qDm1ZK_ZtmsZkMU2DdoOq31QyuldXOYsdcORug3CYMe1LCOKEH3i7bKjoN0DZlbAwWqAxg63XadW3SHm4MOpHgsTAKuVFNu_yeK9cDNX-mDuXUpNN4ctb4L6_8wMTExnefZuri4u2RiumkmJlB3SCam3QYsNb05Lvbi1b7wpvhCK8-XjdylAyPfbaC484zVkufoUgiYHbZHDb7JZn2f5D2VQTMJe7Dkf7bUXx34MeI7AAD__yn-hDM) to acquire eBay on Sunday, despite being roughly a quarter the size of the e-commerce platform it wants to buy. GameStop CEO Ryan Cohen pitched the deal as a path to turn eBay into a ["legit competitor" to Amazon](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1y6yAUBOCnQR0awCCuCorbqHPalBp-DtKJEXgEtuw8fUZ5hfQ7387u53W-WkyYlw-7gWmxzBmOmqA12OdHrZhvFXebXbGtWoy4Q8RlFkwMlCnK1Bwspvcsu2AigIBLB4ZrrUetlNbdasIYPAD3gf8TIoTh4vwgZRi5jGOIUXVoTo0ppjhjA9c9595pDtEzzqQYHZEMAray918Fc1shpnd5wt77snXJrK3dK7n8J2IiYjqOo4_l5R4VM9R6ZoiYYnnRcxht4FcipsVuUFu5U3D2Te1mv0umzd7gdKnD0O0m3A9MCeugiWTLZjH9FrY_vfQ04icAAP__3RR-lg), arguing the platform is "under-earning" and saying he could strip $2 billion in annual costs by cutting eBay's marketing budget. Interviews with Cohen on Monday didn't clarify the specifics of the deal. Pressed repeatedly on how a company with $9.4 billion in cash plans to fund a $56 billion deal, he kept telling [confused TV reporters](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0bGSnDAQBNCvgWwoaQ7QbkDghOycOqQGNFrGJyQszd4Wf-9a_4Lz7lfV1b8-l0-SKOnxkw6eNOQl8atGVuWyPGuV9FWlUFozaSUJUjjIY0GDI5gBzLB4kngtfeunwIz80fJknXN3NwzOtfs04j0YvqH1HnG8G2P7wMGhpdtHcO7WyvTWzGAGa8xoXWfttjrLYTPW9Hhfm96wF82l-50l6c4hXvmbS7flo43TrnrW5uNHg3ODc5BEaePuoj3nd6LB-aDyxVobnKmobJEbnB90cNV8VigXJdjyzgmqeK7KZ4U_T64qOVXICfb8gi0fJ6ULXhIjnHRByAV4pQs8UwTdGTwrSaxAhd-t_Czw4rWKMljE0Q4D9t2uR2zL5M83JHV0TW8eB0n8t0b_64LvCf8GAAD__xVBnkQ) that the details were "on our website." The cash-and-stock bid offers $125 a share, a 20% premium to Friday's close. eBay shares jumped 5% on the news. GameStop's stock fell nearly 10% as investors questioned whether the math actually works.
## Google, White House Launch America 250 Site
The National Archives, [White House Task Force 250](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGyniAQBeCn0Q4HuPoTC4o0djdtSmeFRTZBcGC95n_7jHmF1Gfmm3POz8_1EyhR3n_AgZZDWTPeLSEz1vVqjfLvRhXyVoAbUKCKgfZVS_0SchJyWj1Qeq9j721A1PjRo1XGmNlMkzF9tPMMqL_NMGuv3IhqMgo8bDqAVnIcsSf7aHKSk5LypcyglNuMwuCkkqOet26U6IlLHX4VyhwxpHf5wjq4cvTJRuazdR_fO710ernvewjlz7PiyTu9nCURk2udXjbaBaOL4oGaCKU6bILrdZwC_EFZXDkhtChO4EqFyYmNKkcPb3FeLYpYDmwiA1PJN3nsq_XnTSlRe5lulPsBlP4V4_9688vqvwEAAP__j5SNpA), and Google Arts & Culture launched a sprawling new online exhibit Monday called _Making of the Nation_ , billed as the digital front door to America's 250th birthday celebration this summer. The hybrid experience uses AI, interactive storytelling, and 3D digital galleries to bring founding-era documents and artifacts to life. A virtual _Founders Museum_ lets visitors explore Benjamin Franklin's electrical experiments, George Washington's [dentures and inaugural suit](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLES2yAQRL8GddIAkkxUUKRR57QpNQcc0iUIPHCyx3-fsX8h9c7u7Hu_79sdKFHef8GJlmPZMr5aQmas29Ua5b-NKmRXgBtQpIqR9k1Lfevl3Mt5C0DpvU1dsBFR49ihVcaYxcyzMd1hpZx1dOM4Bo-L01NwP6QOYzRqcmoZdUf2syZnOSspb8oMSnlnFEYvlZz04sQkMRCXOvwplPnAmN7liXXw5eySPZgfTYw_hV6FXl0q-7CXsicUevXlfEB-9x8ooddycUXwRw859JSJCZie-Imgcuv9lfiq3yImdBWY8t7DiZU8CL121YbHi1KidjNikvsJlL43-L_cPa3-FwAA__-uWIT-), and stories from battles like Valley Forge. The Archives also partnered with Google's NotebookLM to bring some of the archives' 180,000+ documents to life as interactive experience, including personal letters from the Founding Fathers. clean_body: The U.S. military in the Strait of Hormuz on Monday after Iran launched cruise missiles, drones, and small boats at U.S. Navy ships and commercial vessels. | | | | | | Tuesday, May 5, 2026 ---|--- Good Morning! On this date in 1862, Mexican troops defeated a superior French army at the Battle of Puebla, inspiring the annual holiday that we celebrate today, though perhaps now more in thanks for the margaritas than the military victory. A bakery truck driver in New Jersey was happily cruising along on Sunday, singing along to a tune, smacked his truck. You can see the dashcam video in Et Cetera below. The stock market has been on a tear as of late. Both the S&P 500 and Nasdaq both closed at fresh all-time highs last Friday, and the Dow is climbing back toward 50,000. Yesterday was down a bit, but the market has been rallying. What's actually driving it? Is it Big Tech earnings? The AI buildout? Hopes that the war in Iran ends soon? On today's episode of The Flyover Podcast , host Ayla Brown breaks down the three forces behind Wall Street's record run and what investors are watching next. ! Today's sponsor, , is developing next-generation AI-powered kitchen robots--backed by NVIDIA and already used by major brands--to transform the massive fast-food industry with faster, more efficient automation | US Sinks 6 Iranian Boats in Hormuz The U.S. military in the Strait of Hormuz on Monday after Iran launched cruise missiles, drones, and sent small boats at U.S. Navy ships and commercial vessels. The flare-up came as President Trump kicked off Project Freedom, a to guide hundreds of stranded commercial ships out of the Persian Gulf. Two U.S.-flagged merchant vessels successfully transited the strait on Monday, but a United Arab Emirates-owned tanker was hit by Iranian drones, and a South Korean cargo ship was also targeted. Trump said Iran's small boats are and called on South Korea to join the mission after one of its cargo ships was hit. The UAE moved schools to remote learning through Friday over safety concerns. GameStop Makes $56B Play for eBay Video game retailer GameStop made an unsolicited to acquire eBay on Sunday, despite being roughly a quarter the size of the e-commerce platform it wants to buy. GameStop CEO Ryan Cohen pitched the deal as a path to turn eBay into a , arguing the platform is "under-earning" and saying he could strip $2 billion in annual costs by cutting eBay's marketing budget. Interviews with Cohen on Monday didn't clarify the specifics of the deal. Pressed repeatedly on how a company with $9.4 billion in cash plans to fund a $56 billion deal, he kept telling that the details were "on our website." The cash-and-stock bid offers $125 a share, a 20% premium to Friday's close. eBay shares jumped 5% on the news. GameStop's stock fell nearly 10% as investors questioned whether the math actually works. Google, White House Launch America 250 Site The National Archives, , and Google Arts & Culture launched a sprawling new online exhibit Monday called Making of the Nation , billed as the digital front door to America's 250th birthday celebration this summer. The hybrid experience uses AI, interactive storytelling, and 3D digital galleries to bring founding-era documents and artifacts to life. A virtual Founders Museum lets visitors explore Benjamin Franklin's electrical experiments, George Washington's -, and stories from battles like Valley Forge. The Archives also partnered with Google's NotebookLM to bring some of the archives' 180,000+ documents to life as interactive experience, including personal letters from the Founding Fathers. Visitors can step inside the project at . It's Election Day, everybody! I hope everyone has a plan to go vote today.
Tonight, I'll be going live around 7:45 after the polls close.
You can watch at **[theangrydem.com](https://substack.com/redirect/f84f049b-5303-455b-9ac7-9e73f8c62c97?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , **[theangryohioan.com](https://substack.com/redirect/8b913bf6-c25a-45c1-ad17-0e5e4b1a327a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , or on **[Facebook](https://substack.com/redirect/842b44cd-479e-4293-be28-cd3584d03537?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , **[YouTube](https://substack.com/redirect/8c54683b-3cfd-4807-a095-678b152964ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , and **[X](https://substack.com/redirect/28c5a9ca-88de-483d-928a-a1f04d21ab2b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
I'm just going to be hanging out, watching the results come in, giving my comments, and maybe having a few guests swing by as the night unfolds.

Below, I'll include some resources that may help you before you head to the polls.
Google your county name and "Board of Elections." Your local board of elections usually has everything you need, including polling locations, sample ballots, candidate lists, and basic voting information.
**[https://www.waynecountyoh.gov/](https://substack.com/redirect/54a5461f-7865-4278-9520-978d5c9d97d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

[https://www.boe.ohio.gov/ashland/](https://substack.com/redirect/dc3c83b2-f012-47a9-be38-29d8bcfc85c6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

[https://www.boe.ohio.gov/medina/](https://substack.com/redirect/b193df46-2d2f-4bc3-9c5a-94a036e42df5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
**[https://boe.cuyahogacounty.gov/](https://substack.com/redirect/8bf8adc0-69af-4b36-b350-0d7eda43574d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
And please, take a few minutes to look at your sample ballot before you go.
Know who is actually running in these races. Do not just walk in and let the first name you recognize make the decision for you.
There are candidate lists available, and **[Vote411 from the League of Women Voters](https://substack.com/redirect/d7ca026c-9e26-4440-ad57-a05b27ea39fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** is another great resource. It can show you polling **locations, sample ballots, candidate information** , and what you need to bring with you to vote.
**It may be raining, so take an umbrella**.
The best times to go are usually outside the rush hours.
Avoid before work, lunch, and right after work if you can.
If you go during one of the random slower parts of the day, you will probably be in and out.
And honestly, this is a midterm primary, so it should not be anything like waiting in line during a presidential year.

### The Statewide Races I'm Watching
The first race I'm watching is the Republican primary for governor.
**Vivek Ramaswamy** is the endorsed GOP candidate, but **Casey Putsch** , also known online as **[Casey the Car Guy,](https://substack.com/redirect/ec092658-9086-480f-b75b-b05e56d0f69e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** has been getting a lot of support on social media. He has not raised a ton of money, so the question is whether that online energy actually translates into votes.
I do not think the real question is whether Vivek wins. I think the real question is how much he wins by. That margin will tell us something about how real the online grassroots energy around Casey actually was, and the actual popularity of Vivek.
* * *
The **attorney general** race between **[Elliot Forhan](https://substack.com/redirect/61d2a809-8192-47f7-a370-739374494593?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and **[John Kulewicz](https://substack.com/redirect/9f01fb01-b086-4044-a180-0d998b70e3ae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. John is the endorsed Democratic candidate, and Elliot has some baggage. I do not know if everybody knows the actual stories behind Elliot Forhan's baggage, but to be perfectly honest, it seems like some of it was overblown and turned into a smear campaign. He definitely has people who strongly support him, but I do not know if that will be enough to overcome the Democratic endorsement.

Then there is the **Secretary of State race** , which is probably the one everyone is paying attention to statewide. **[Bryan Hambley](https://substack.com/redirect/182c8fb5-72cb-4383-8838-49c7ee45e0c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/182c8fb5-72cb-4383-8838-49c7ee45e0c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)is running against **[Allison Russo](https://substack.com/redirect/b1f1e36e-8135-4827-9827-8b094fc14982?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. Russo is the establishment Democrat, the House Minority Leader, and basically the party's candidate. Hambley is the grassroots candidate. He has built a strong campaign, raised a hell of a lot of money, and created real energy around his race.
If Brian Hambley wins, it will be considered an upset, but also somehow expected. I know that sounds contradictory, but that is exactly how this race feels. If Allison Russo pulls it off, that will also feel natural because she is the party-backed candidate. But it would also feel a little unnatural because Hambley has clearly built something real.

I'm also watching **Ohio 's 9th Congressional District Republican primary**, which is fascinating.
The incumbent is the Iron Babushka (tm [D.J. Byrnes](https://open.substack.com/users/737165-dj-byrnes?utm_source=mentions)) herself, **[Marcy Kaptur](https://substack.com/redirect/60e20fe6-c0ab-4ca0-956e-de1bc36d1d0b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. But Republicans are throwing a lot at this seat because they think she may be vulnerable.
Josh Williams, Derek Merrin, Alea Nadeem, Madison Sheahan, and Charles Kinsel are all in the mix.
And they are raising serious money. Williams has raised around $800,000. Merrin has raised around $760,000. Nadeem has raised around $700,000. They are fighting like hell over there because they think this is their shot.
To be perfectly honest, I would not bet against Marcy Kaptur no matter what the political landscape looks like or how much money Republicans raise.
Derek Merrin may be the favorite to win the primary, but Josh Williams has raised more money, and Nadeem could possibly slide in if the others split votes.
Who knows, maybe one of the other candidates catches just enough support to squeak through. It is almost like Ohio's 7th District, but for Republicans.
[Share The Angry Democrat](https://substack..IJ5Hk-SiRBrsrnLb2PFTk8E6geGU16AYYHTyB7tYVdk?)
* * *
**Ohio 's 14th District** is another one I'm paying attention to. On the Republican side, **Nicole** **Frenchko** is to primary **David Joyce.** It ain't gonna happen, but she is out there.
On the Democratic side, **[Maria Jukic](https://substack.com/redirect/53946478-aa75-460e-aa6d-7836b3af3c64?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , **[Carl Setzer](https://substack.com/redirect/bc8b76b4-0549-459e-93a9-aa9f81024845?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , and **[Bill O'Neill](https://substack.com/redirect/a9fd7b67-acd1-451d-a294-c9c60d47ebbe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** are competing for the nomination. What surprised me most is how little money has been raised in that race. Maria is the top fundraiser with only about $21,000. Carl has around $13,000. Bill O'Neill did not raise anything. I do not know if the plan was just to win the primary without fundraising, but considering the year Democrats may have, I expected a lot more money to go into that race.

### **The Local Races That I am Looking Forward To**
Moving into the local races, there are a few statehouse races I'm watching closely.
**House District 18** is one of them. Gabe Crenshaw, Samuel Gruber, Peter Hoffman, and Davida Russell are all competing for the Democratic nomination. That is a race worth watching because these local primaries are where the future of the party actually gets shaped, whether people want to admit it or not.
**House District 19** is another big one. **Dionna Gore, Cheryl Perez, and Nicole Sigurdson** are all competing for the Democratic nomination. Nicole is the endorsed candidate in that race, but I would not count out Dionna or Cheryl. Nicole has been carrying some baggage that I do not think she has fully shaken, and that has rallied a lot of people against her.
There is also a Democratic write-in candidate in House District 19, **Azaadjeet Singh.** To be perfectly honest, I did not know about him until he texted me a couple days ago, but I wish him well.

### County Council Races to Watch
Cuyahoga County Council Districts 3 and 11.
In **County Council District 3,** incumbent **Martin J. Sweeney** is facing **Anise Mayo**. I do not think this is going to be much of a competition. I expect Sweeney to run away with it. But trust me, I love surprises.
**County Council District 11** is much more interesting. **Shirley Smith, Ebony Spano, and Christine McIntosh** are all running for the seat, and there was no endorsement in that race. I have met each of them on multiple occasions, and I think this is going to be a very interesting race to watch once the results start coming in.
